page_content: HIST343 Empires, Revolutions, and Cold Wars: Modern Central and Eastern Europe (3 Credits) We live in an international system upended by Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine in 2022. Central and Eastern Europe -- a region largely taken for granted since the end of the Cold War -- is now once again the key battleground for the future of the rules-based global order. This course will offer a broad overview of that region's history since the late 1700s -- through empires, revolutions, and cold wars -- and provide students with the critical tools to develop their own views on that history. Credit Only Granted for: HIST328L or HIST343. Formerly: HIST328L.
